parsed_output.justification: Justin's claims are highly inconsistent; he first claims to be the Robber, then changes his story to being the Drunk, and eventually admits he might be a Werewolf because he was the Drunk. Mike (claiming Seer) stated he saw two Werewolves in the center; since the Drunk acts after the Seer, Justin could have swapped his card with one of those Werewolves. Justin's own admission and erratic behavior make him the most likely candidate for the Werewolf role.
